description.de: Standard der in OSCI, XTA, XÖV, ebMS, AS4, eDelivery etc. eingesetzt wird um Nachrichteninhalte zu übermitteln.
description.en: XML (eXtensible Markup Language) is a W3C-standardised markup language for encoding structured data in a human- and machine-readable text format. It underpins many eGovernment data-exchange formats such as XÖV, OSCI and eDelivery.
